programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: Blue World Ep508: Shark’s “Tonic Immobility” + Diving with NASA
programme.desc: Neal Harvey, a world-renown shark handler in the Bahamas, teaches us how to put Reef Sharks into a relaxed state known as tonic immobility. Then, we head to NASA’s Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston, where astronauts train for space walking underwater.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep703: Exploring sea caves stunning river valleys
programme.desc: Facing Waves host Ken Whiting explores the spectacular Canadian sea caves of les Îles de la Madeleine by sea kayak, and then paddles through one of North America’s most stunning river valleys in Jacques Cartier National Park.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep102: Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports including Jet Sprinting, Aquabike Racing and F1 H2O Powerboats. This episode features Round 2 of the Australian V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships from Temora in New South Wales, Australia.

programme.title: Coral Reefs: Trouble In Paradise
programme.desc: An international scientific team travels to the Chagos Archipelago, a tropical paradise in the Indian Ocean, to study one of the planet’s healthiest coral reefs. Initially, they’re thrilled with the reef’s beauty and abundance. But in the space of just a few weeks they witness a serious case of bleaching…evidence that even the earth’s most isolated places aren’t safe from the ravages of climate change

programme.title: Undone: Female Big-Wave Surfing
programme.desc: Undone is a remarkable story of personal endeavor following female professional surfer, Laura Enever, who leaves a top spot on the WSL Championship Tour to explore the unpredictable world of big-wave surfing. In a life altering change, Laura works to break into the male dominated sport by pursuing some of the most dangerous and remote waves on the planet.

programme.title: Balance
programme.desc: Legendary professional snowboarder David Carrier-Porcheron reflects on Surf, Skate, and Snow culture, taking a closer look at what brings balance and happiness to people’s lives. Join us for this thoughtful and exhilarating ride with DCP.

programme.title: Perspektiv
programme.desc: David Carrier-Porcheron is a titan in the snowboarding community. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, DCP and family were left stranded in Costa Rica. Perspektiv tells the story of his return to snow after 13 months. Watch as he rediscovers his love of snowboarding, and why he can’t live without it.

programme.title: A New Beginning
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure
programme.desc: Legendary snowboarder Terje Haakonsen finds new joy in riding small parks and mellow terrain wherever he goes, explaining, “What I like about snowskates is that it makes small hills big again.” Join us for this fascinating look at snowskate subculture.

programme.title: Mission Antarctic
programme.desc: ‘Mission Antarctic’ is a snowboarding expedition to the world’s end. Xavier de le Rue and Lucas DeBari set out from the Falklands on a 20-meter sailboat, navigating the Drake Passage to explore the Antarctic Peninsula. Awarded ‘Best Freeride Movie’ at the 2013 International Freeride Film Festival.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Yellow Flickers
programme.desc: Do the lines in the road countdown to a supposed arrival? Or are they added up within us, allowing us to grow?

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 1
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid

programme.title: Jumping International La Baule - GP La Baule
programme.desc: The competition that closes the madness that has happened at the Longines Jumping International in La Baule is definitely the Grand Prix. For a grand total of 200,000 euros, riders face a first round and a jump-off with a height of 1.60m. There is no mistake that, at a ranking of CSIO 5*, this is one of the toughest competitions in France only possible for the top equestrian athletes.Watch the highlights for La Baule Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 1
programme.desc: We begin this chapter rating and voting the student boxes organization at the stables and learning some tips on how horses should be taken care of in the stables. We will clean our equipment properly before feeding the horses and then we will be receiving Doctor Menegon, the voice for the Italian and International horse-riding competitions and introducing our special guest Rolf-Göran Bengtsson. Tune in on the Episode 2 Chapter 1 of Horse Academy Pro, exclusively on HorseTV!

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 4 - Arville
programme.desc: The FEI Eventing Nations Cup is back with leg 4 in Belgium! Teams reunite in Arville to compete in eventing and become the best nation in the equestrian sport. Last time, France moved to the top in Le Pin au Haras, and competition is proving to be complicated. Are you ready for the challenge?Watch the best moments of the fourth leg in Arville.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 5 - Boekelo
programme.desc: Boekelo, in The Netherlands, is the last stop of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021. Team Sweden wants to repeat their victory from 2019 and as defending champions they will deliver a top sport performance. However, Great Britain is on the lead of this leg with 80.8 points thanks to the stellar performance of Fox-Pitt and Nicola Wilson. Will this be enough to earn the title? Find out now in the final leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Polo Club de Chantilly vs Polo Club Düsseldorf
programme.desc: Welcome to the Polo Rider Cup. The ultimate polo club competition has arrived to the Polo Club of Chantilly facilities. This time, it is the turn of the hosts, Polo Club de Chantilly, to face the Polo Club Düsseldorf. Who will be victorious at the start of the competition?

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to episode 3 of The Polo Show. This time we travel to the home of polo for a special look at the iconic English season. Set within the land of the rolling green fields with sports running through its heart amongst castles and history there is no better place for the home of polo to be.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: This is episode 4 of The Polo Show. We take a look back at the highlights from some of the most prestigious polo tournaments that dominated the European circuit this summer. We will enjoy of olympic history in Berlin with the German Open, horseriding in the beautiful beach or enjoying the French Riviera at the exclusive Saint-Tropez Polo Club in this episode. Come for a ride with us!

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: Competition of the LGCT 2021 continues in the Club de Campo Villa de Madrid as the second leg of this event takes place in sunny Spain. Six top-level Longines Ranking CSI5* classes will take place in the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid and riders will be able to change the total points in the standings.Watch the second leg of the 2021 LGCT competition.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Fly over Norway’s stunning landscapes, from the winding Atlantic Ocean Road to the snow-covered fjords. Experience the beauty of Bud Village and the famous Trollstigen, with calming music and the pure sounds of nature enhancing the tranquil journey.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Transform your screen into an incredible Vancouver Aquarium experience! Enjoy the beauty and diversity of underwater life, with soothing music and the gentle movement of seaweed, creating a calming atmosphere. Marvel at the vibrant fish and marine creatures.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Experience the diverse landscapes of Turkey through a captivating aerial journey. From the serene beaches and mountains to ancient ruins and lush forests, this video is a perfect blend of nature and tranquility.

programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German manufacturer Roding created a car that even outshined the Porsche GT3 with an impressive power/weight ratio. British makes like the Caterham 620 R, Lotus Elise or Radical RXC also showed what's in play in regards to lightweight sports cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin Vanquish is timeless and carries the strongest engine of the British brand under its hood. Also: Arden gave a Jaguar a power treatment and transformed the F-Type R to their Arden AJ23. And: the Morgan AR P4 roadster.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 4
programme.desc: We arrive to Spain for the GC32 Mar Menor Cup! The crews are ready for a grandiose final of the season as this is their last chance to improve their standings. Precision, coordination and pure skill is of essence, and Spanish waters will prove to be harder to navigate than expected. Will Allinghi take the overall victory?Watch the best moments of the GC32 Mar Menor Cup 2021.

programme.title: Le Défi Azimut - Episode 1
programme.desc: One month before the Vendée Globe 2016, the best Imoca skippers were able to test their boat for the last time during the sixth edition of the Défi Azimut. Every year, this festive weekend provides an opportunity for all stakeholders in ocean sailing to see the Imoca 60 boats and to meet their skipper on the dock.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: The Crikvenica Riviera is one of the most scenic parts of the Adriatic coast with a rich diversity of attractive beaches, green hinterland, a continental wooden area, a climate that provides perfect refreshment in the summer time and just the right amount of action-packed fun in the sun. Find out more in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome, sailors! In this episode of Sail-ho Croatia we arrive to the incredibly beautiful, fragrant and action-packed island of Cres. The islands of Cres and Lošinj are connected to the ancient legend of Jason and the Argonauts in their search for the golden fleece aboard the Argo. Stick around to find out the best spots in these islands!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 3 - SA Open
programme.desc: The penultimate event of the South African Surf Series takes place at Pollock Beach. This is one of the highlights of the WSL Africa tour and features a Women’s QS 3000, Men’s QS 1000 and Junior Men and Women’s QS 1000 rated events. With a field of top international and local surfers, this event is bound to heat up as the best South African Surfers face off some formidable opponents. Fierce competition may see some position changes ahead of the final event of the series.

programme.title: Almost Invisible

programme.title: Holistay

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E11 - Royal Children Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E02 - Meateaters
programme.desc: Papua New Guinea Pt2. Jim brings meat to the local village while Corey explores leech infested swamps looking for the local deer. Local villagers tell Jim of a remote area 400 miles away where buffalo roam.

programme.title: Wardens - S08:E09 - Best Of Michigan Whitetail Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan's archery deer season lasts 77 days and the regular firearm season is 16 days long. Over that time period, C. O.'s use a variety of tactics to make sure everyone is playing by the rules.

programme.title: Wardens - S08:E10 - Pure Michigan
programme.desc: The state of Michigan is highlighted through a contest to win hunting licenses and over $4000 in prizes. Officers also patrol during a summer boating festival and the firearm deer season.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E08 - Naturally Raw
programme.desc: This episode begins in Costa Rica, in an amazing rain forest. Here they make delicious chocolate out of cocoa beans. Mother Nature is at her magnificent best – showcasing hundreds of plant and animal species. And then to Kenya where green monkeys will be our tour-guides in the Lost City of Gedi plus a closer look at the wildlife which lives in very close proximity to the bustling streets of Nairobi.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E09 - Naturally Invigorating
programme.desc: Iceland: home to volcanic lakes and hot springs and mono-chromatic vistas. And then to Laos in South East Asia with its lush jungles, underground caves and water buffalo along the Mekong River.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis reminds Claudio of the convenience of keeping their relationship hidden to avoid raising suspicions while living the freedom of their love. Guillermo once again issues a death sentence on Alberto, should Lorena consider leaving him for Alberto. Alberto shows up at Lorena's house under the pretext of checking on Ignacio; she is terrified recalling Guillermo's threat, telling him that it's not a good idea for him to be there, but a lovestruck Alberto responds that he cannot, does not want to, nor plans to leave her life.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Pablo once again asks Malena to return to the house or else he will make public his "romance" with Isabel. Gertrudis' argument has no effect on Alberto, who is willing to continue investigating his father's murder. Guillermo arrives armed in front of the Corona's house, with the intention of killing Alberto for trying to take Lorena's love away from him.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max está demasiado dolido y no cree ya en ese amor, advirtiéndole que a partir de ahora se dedicará a odiarla, a olvidarla y que será ella la victima de su propia decisión. Ciego de ira y de dolor, grita a los presentes que se retiren pues no habrá boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La vida de Camila ha dado un giro inusitado: es una persona envenenada por el odio y los deseos de venganza. Max no logra superar su resentimiento por el desprecio y la humillación que le hizo Camila. La verdadera razón por la cual no pudieron casarse, está escrita en el cuaderno que Rosa envió.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila le exige a Marcelina que le confiese lo que decían las cartas que mandó a quemar. Ante tanta presión ésta cuenta lo que para inculpar a Rosa Blanco. Max

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel plantea de forma desinteresada ayudar a Camila a encontrar a su mamá, pero ella expresa que será un trato en que ambos ganarán. Fausto sorprende a Julia con Gregorio en el apartamento de Amelia. Max, desahoga su dolor con Astrid, a quien Camila pidió que lo ayudara a olvidarla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fuerte tensión cuando Max encuentra a Camila en la mansión López Méndez. Fausto y Patricia, duros y crueles, agreden a Julia, pero saben que el peor castigo vendrá de manos de su propio padre, Ezequiel.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: Er Relajo Del Loro
programme.desc: Un loro que tras ser vendido a unos traficantes de animales cuando era pequeño, va pasando de dueño en dueño durante toda su vida y cambiando su nombre de acuerdo a su propietario, mirando frente a sus ojos la evolución de Venezuela durante 50 años (1950/2000).

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.title: Distopia
programme.desc: Impulsados por antiguos planes esotéricos, poderosas elites ocultas emplean armas bioquímicas, guerra psicológica, cuarentenas mundiales, e incluso magia negra para controlar el futuro de la humanidad y alcanzar la inmortalidad

programme.title: Er Relajo Del Loro
programme.desc: Un loro que tras ser vendido a unos traficantes de animales cuando era pequeño, va pasando de dueño en dueño durante toda su vida y cambiando su nombre de acuerdo a su propietario, mirando frente a sus ojos la evolución de Venezuela durante 50 años (1950/2000).

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: Martí Noticias
programme.desc: En Martí Noticias News te traemos las últimas novedades globales, ofreciendo una cobertura y análisis en profundidad de los temas más apremiantes.
